author: Constantin A.
pros: The best feature I have ever experienced with Eset is the real time monitoring. It monitors the activity of all the account tracking parameters to detect the least unusual activity.It provides a complete log , behavior based detection, preventing data leaks and much more.
cons: A lack in this tool is that it consumes too much system resources. It is quite difficult to use for beginners and provides sometimes false positives. There is also a limit in its cloud integration. The last element is that it does not encrypt the whole disk. It those weakness could be corrected, it will be perfect

description: Satisfecho con la solución de este producto que ofrece seguridad en los equipos.
author: Oscar B.
pros: La facilidad de gestión del antivirus desde la consola.
cons: Problemas puntuales par desinstalar el antivirus en un equipo. O para añadir algun componente que está instalado en el equipo pero que no aparece en la consola gestión y se debe crear tarea adicionales para añadirlo (Ej. ESET LiveGuard)

description: Smooth and reliable. The centralized dashboard makes managing endpoints easy, and threat detection is fast and accurate. Great for businesses needing strong security with minimal hassle.
author: Brennan G.
pros: Real-time monitoring: Excellent at detecting unusual activity and preventing data leaks. Centralized management: Easy to manage all devices from a single console. Quick threat response: Fast and effective endpoint protection. Detailed reporting: Offers comprehensive logs and behavior-based detection.
cons: High resource usage: Can slow down lower-end systems1. Steep learning curve: Setup and configuration may be difficult for beginners2. Limited cloud integration: Not fully optimized for cloud environments1.

review_title: Good threat protection for your home business
description: The interface was ok. The security was good and laptop well protected and it did not slow down my laptop.
author: Georgina A.
pros: Great price for SMB. I used the the ESET PROTECT Hub for MSSP. I wanted to get more deep dive into buying a couple of licenses but they actually offer a pretty good comprehensive solution that contained endpoint security which I wanted (Complete). The reporting in the dashboard is standard and basic.
cons: Getting mobiles protected was not good. The app they make you download is terrible and has very little features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mehmet K.
pros: Seeing and managing all computers from a single screen. Be informed about important events with various notifications.
cons: I have been using Eset for years, but traditional antiviruses are now weak. I think they should strengthen their modules regarding edr/xdr.

author: Fatih K.
pros: Can be distributed easily. Can be applied easily. Easy to manage.
cons: Although it has shortcomings in the current conjecture, its price is high.

author: Mustafa A.
pros: I use it for patch management. It is successful for patches to be applied to client PCs.
cons: When a patch is sent, it may fail for various reasons. The reason for this may be easier to find.

review_title: My Experience With ESET Protect Complete - Affordable and Effective
author: Fatura M.
pros: I like the quick threat response which makes the software effective as an endpoint protection solution. The software comes with amazing cybersecurity features.
cons: No disregards for the ESET solution as it has effectively delivered as expected.

author: omar F.
cons: costs although it is not something expensive for a company

author: Harun A.
pros: It makes it easy to manage the entire company from one place.
cons: It may take some time to get used to the management screen. At least that's how it was for me.
